dismech
Browse Embeddings Docs Modules Trajectories Classifications Research Schema

Deep Research Reports

Integrated literature summaries for every curated disorder

Browse deep-research reports by disorder, open each report on its own page, and jump straight into a disorder page's integrated literature summaries.

1374 disorders 1780 reports

What You Can Do Here

  • Search disorders and filter by the provider that generated each report.
  • Open any individual report on its own standalone page.
  • Jump directly to each disorder page's literature summaries section.
Home / Deep Research

Provider Key

Edison Formerly Falcon in report filenames; deep research generated via Edison Scientific.
Asta Literature citations and snippets provided by Ai2 Asta.
OpenAI Deep research generated using OpenAI models.
Cyberian Includes both Cyberian and Cyberian Codex reports.
Perplexity Deep research generated using Perplexity search/reasoning workflows.
Claude Code Web-grounded agentic deep research run via the local Claude Code CLI (WebSearch/WebFetch only); no separate API key required.
⚠️ Fallback Not a true deep research run; produced by fallback extraction logic.
OpenScientist Includes OpenScientist and OpenScientist Review reports.
Other All providers outside the standard categories listed here.

Filter By Provider

Multiple selection is supported.
